SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-08-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:03am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk-Beth Wilber, Dept. 525:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, AAMCO Transmissions, Inc. appears through counsel, Jeffrey L. Fillerup; Respondents, James Bolter and Susan Bolter, appears in Pro Per. Mr. Fillerup advises the Court that he feels AAMCO is incorrectly named as a Respondent. He requests, via an oral motion, that case name be amended to "John Wo, dba S Wo Enterprise. Parties stipulate that Mr. Wo agrees to step in as the Appellant. The new name of Respondent will be added Mr. Wo is present in Court to represent S Woo Enterprise, and his request for a continuance is denied by the Court, because Mr. Woo had no good cause to continue.
EXHR(A) Original Warranty
11:04am
Matter is submitted, newly marked evidence is retained.
